displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) #34: Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon, Part III
synopsis: Hiding out on the world where she grew up, everyone's favorite scoundrel, Doctor Aphra, takes a trip down memory lane. As it turns out, memory lane is a hellhole covered in the agonizing thermal landmines of emotional honesty and family dysfunction. Also bounty hunters. Lots and lots of bounty hunters.
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) #34: Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon, Part III
